en: Ariana was filming until 3 o'clock in the morning yesterday, and then had to dye her hair black.
ko: 아리아나는 어제 새벽 3시까지 촬영하고 머리를 염색해야 했어.

en: From fluorescent red, which is basically what it was. Fluorescent red.
And I've just come from London, so... You're jet-lagged.
I'm jet-lagged, and your brain frozen from the chemicals that you left within your hair.
ko: 나는 시차 적응 중이고, 너는 머리에 있는 화학물질 때문에 얼어붙었어.

en: You know, the other thing in the room is that we're supposed to be in school together, but Ariana's 19, and I'm...
ko: 방 안의 다른 점은 우리가 함께 학교에 있어야 한다는 건데,
